steps.title: Substitute x = 41 into the equation
steps.content:
We're given an equation to predict the number of larvae from the number of worker ants. For $x = 41$ worker ants, substitute this value directly:
$$y = 0.67(41) + 2.6$$

steps.title: Evaluate and find the closest choice
steps.content:
Calculate the result:
$$0.67(41) + 2.6 = 27.47 + 2.6 = 30.07$$
The predicted number of larvae is approximately 30.07. Looking at the choices, this is closest to 30. That matches choice A — A is correct.
